name: Medical Entry Tests
description: MDCAT, NMDCAT, NUMS MDCAT and Army Medical style preparation with science, English and reasoning practice.

name: Engineering & Computer Science Entry Tests
description: FAST, NUST NET, ECAT, PIEAS, GIKI, IST and Air University preparation through quantitative, analytical and subject practice.

name: Undergraduate Admission Tests
description: NAT, USAT, HEC and university-route admission tests with English, mathematics, general knowledge and reasoning.

name: Graduate Admission & Scholarship Tests
description: GAT, GRE, GMAT and scholarship-test preparation with verbal, quantitative and analytical writing skills.

name: Law Admission Tests
description: LAT, Law GAT and LSAT-style preparation with reading, legal aptitude and logical reasoning.

name: Forces & Intelligence Tests
description: ISSB and initial intelligence test preparation with verbal, non-verbal, analytical and personality-oriented practice.

name: English Language Proficiency Tests
description: IELTS, TOEFL and PTE preparation through reading, writing, listening, speaking, grammar and vocabulary.

name: International Aptitude Tests
description: SAT, GRE, GMAT and LSAT preparation with international-style verbal, quantitative and reasoning practice.
